combined_text: Grandmother Knows Best: What Happened When I Covered Myself In Noxzema Every Night (PHOTOS) My Grandma Annie Ruth has the smoothest skin I’ve ever touched. At 90 years young with a diet filled with fried chicken, collard greens and sweet potato pie, you’d probably imagine someone with saggy, blemished skin. But she has a face that puts a baby’s bottom to shame. Seriously. And her secret is
